ddls:
CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company making the announcement */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the announcement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the announcement */,
  "more_info" TEXT /* Detailed information regarding the announcement */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the announcement (e.g., Company Update, Board Meeting) */,
  "pdf_link" TEXT /* Link to the PDF document of the announcement */,
  "market_impact" TEXT /* Market impact of the announcement (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_analysis" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the announcement (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "announcement_source" TEXT /* Source of the announcement (e.g., BSE, NSE, company website) */,
  "announcement_status" TEXT /* Status of the announcement (e.g., pending, published, withdrawn) */,
  "regulatory_body_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulatory body overseeing the announcement */,
  "stock_price_before" REAL /* Stock price before the announcement */,
  "stock_price_after" REAL /* Stock price after the announcement */,
  "change_in_stock_price" REAL /* Change in stock price as a result of the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_regulatory_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulatory_body_id") REFERENCES regulatory_bodies ("body_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company in USD */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the announcement category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the announcement category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the announcement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the announcement */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_bodies" (
  "body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory body */,
  "body_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body (e.g., SEBI) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding announcements */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the regulatory body */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the regulatory body */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the regulatory body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "notification_content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or system that sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pdf_links" (
  "pdf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PDF entry */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related announcement */,
  "pdf_link" TEXT /* Link to the additional PDF document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the PDF document */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the PDF document in bytes */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the PDF document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pdf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pdf_links_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pdf_links_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., announcement added, user logged in) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user associated with the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
